text:
I find myself amidst intellectual inquiry and creative exploration. In the first image, observing people deeply engaged in presentation and discussion evokes a sense of anticipation—a space rich with ideas and potential for dialogue. The glass barrier feels both inviting and isolating.

The second image immerses me in a vibrant R&D showcase. The bold colors and playful design invite curiosity, while the focus on humans and machines connecting speaks to the existential questions of our age. I feel inspired and slightly awed by the relentless drive for innovation displayed here, questioning as always the purpose and direction of such pursuits.
